avg_shares_per_holder.python_example:
gb = tq.get_gb_info(stock_code='600519.SH', date_list=['20260513'], count=1)
gp = tq.get_gpjy_value(stock_list=['600519.SH'], field_list=['GP1'], start_time='20260513', end_time='20260513')
ltgb = gb['600519.SH']['Ltgb']  # жөҒйҖҡиӮЎжң¬(дёҮиӮЎ)
holders = gp['600519.SH']['GP1'][-1]['Value']  # иӮЎдёңдәәж•°
avg_shares = float(ltgb) * 10000 / float(holders)  # жҲ·еқҮжҢҒиӮЎ(иӮЎ)
